examples: Can you imagine a dry, mirthless and completely joke-free Strangelove?
That would be like... well, actually, it would be like about half of Dr. Strangelove.
Above: Chewing up the scenery in the War Room: "Dr. Strangelove" (Stanley Kubrick, 1964).
His favorite movies are Dr. Strangelove, Do the Right Thing, Annie Hall, Airplane, and Talk to Her.
He also did the makeup for Peter Sellers in "Doctor Strangelove, " Lucasfilm said on its starwars.com website.
